nodes.label: AC-004: Verify modules can be imported without ImportError
Verify ApprovalPanel component can be imported
Verify approval types can be imported
Verify useApprovalPermission hook can be imported
Verify useApprovalBinding hook can be imported
Verify WorkOrder types can be imported
Verify notification types can be imported
AC-001: Verify work order approval flow: frontend page + backend state machine +
Test submitting work order with empty title raises ValueError
Test submitting work order with title exceeding 200 chars raises ValueError
Test submitting work order with empty description raises ValueError
Test submitting work order with description exceeding 2000 chars raises ValueErr
Test submitting work order without category raises ValueError
Test approving work order with version conflict raises error
Test approving work order with invalid status raises error
Test cancelling work order with version conflict raises error
Test fetching work orders returns paginated list
AC-001: Test approval panel interactions and validation
Test that approval panel validates comment minimum 5 characters
Test that approval panel validates work order status
Test that approval panel creates valid submission payload
Test that approval panel rejects empty comment
Test that approval panel rejects whitespace-only comment
Test that approval panel handles approve action correctly
Test that approval panel handles reject action correctly
Test that approval panel handles return action correctly
Test that approval panel properly structures approval history records
AC-001: Test work order status state machine transitions
Test work order transitions from PENDING to APPROVING on submission
Test work order transitions from APPROVING to APPROVED on approval
Test work order transitions from APPROVING to REJECTED on rejection
Test work order transitions from APPROVED to CANCELLED on cancellation
Test work order transitions from REJECTED to CANCELLED on cancellation
Test that CANCELLED status is terminal (no transitions out)
Test that invalid status transition raises error
Test that user with approval role can approve work orders
Test that user without approval role cannot approve work orders
Test that only designated approver can approve specific work order
Test that non-designated user cannot approve work order
AC-001: Test notification mechanism for approval events
Test that notification is triggered when work order is approved
Test that notification is triggered when work order is rejected
Test that notification is triggered when approval is pending
Test that notification is triggered when work order is cancelled
AC-001: Test work order type definitions and validations
Test that WorkOrderStatus enum has all required values
Test that WorkOrderPriority enum has all required values
Test that ApprovalNodeStatus enum has all required values
Test that ApprovalAction enum has all required values
Test that CreateWorkOrderRequest has all required fields
Test that WorkOrderResponse has all required fields
Test that ApprovalResultResponse has all required fields
Test that version is incremented when work order is updated
Test that conflict is detected when local and server versions differ
Test that update is allowed when local and server versions match
Test that approval request includes version for optimistic locking
AC-001: End-to-end integration tests for approval flow
Test complete flow: submission -> approval -> cancellation
Test that approval history is maintained after approval
Test that multiple approval nodes are supported
